---
title: "test_phase_88_path_sovereignty.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/test_phase_88_path_sovereignty.test.ts"
loc: 27
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.47
style_score: 9.35
intel_score: 8.81
overall_score: 9.12
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://vitest)
- [expect](file://vitest)
- [getTracesForFile](file://../src/tools/pennyone/intel/database.js)
- [saveTrace](file://../src/tools/pennyone/intel/database.js)

### Exports
- `unixPath`
- `winPath`
- `missionId`
- `winResults`
- `unixResults`
- `maliciousPath`
- `results`
